ExtensionMethodsWithFkWhereClauseT Method (T, String, String, FuncIFkWhereClauseContext, CancellationToken, TaskString)

One Identity Manager API Server
Configures a dynamic WHERE clause that limits the objects that can be assigned as a foreign-key value.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static T WithFkWhereClause<T>(
	this T method,
	string columnName,
	string tableName,
	Func<IFkWhereClauseContext, CancellationToken, Task<string>> whereClause
)
where T : IEntityWriteMethod

Parameters

method
Type: T
Base method
columnName
Type: SystemString
Name of the foreign-key child column
tableName
Type: SystemString
Name of the foreign-key parent table
whereClause
Type: SystemFuncIFkWhereClauseContext, CancellationToken, TaskString
WHERE clause provider

Type Parameters

T

Return Value

Type: T

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type . When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
